set_fields.close_reason: Fixed Ralph release capability restoration. Ralph now snapshots pre-contract active tools per session file, restores them when a controller/child session is released, refreshes Ralph ownership cache from canonical loop state, clears only released session cache entries, and normalizes cache keys to workspace root. Added regression tests for direct finish, waiting-loop finish, stale agent cache, targeted cache clearing, and root/subdir cache normalization. Verified with npm run gate in extensions/tau.
